mapper.insert:
insert into sys_user_preference ( tenant_id, user_id, preference_key, preference_value, value_type, version, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by ) values
( #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{row.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{row.preferenceKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{row.preferenceValue,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{row.valueType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
on duplicate key update preference_value = values(preference_value), value_type = values(value_type), update_time = values(update_time), update_by = values(update_by)
